name: Red's Dry Rub
recipeIngredient: 11 oz can chili powder, fine ground, light
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly coat all surfaces of the meat with lemon juice.
2. Combine all of the dry ingredients in a bowl.
3. Sprinkle generously over the meat and rub it in well until the meat is entirely covered.
4. Store leftover rub in a tightly sealed container in the refrigerator.
